title: Jukebox into Turntable
body:
This resource pack is made for use with [Visual Jukebox](https://modrinth.com/mod/visual-jukebox)!

Этот ресурспак предназначен для использования с
[Visual Jukebox](https://modrinth.com/mod/visual-jukebox)!
